sections.heading: This Act shall be administered by the Agency. Administration
sections.text:
This Act shall be administered by the Agency. Administration
of Act
The principal Act is amended by the repeal of section three Repeal and
hundred and sixty seven and the substitution therefor of the repcleament
of section
following: 367
Single copies of this Act may be obtained from the Government Printer,
P. 0. Box 30136, 10101 Lusaka. Price K1000 each
72 [ No. 12 of 2010 Companies (Amendment)
Registrar 367. The Registrar shall exercise the powers and perform
the duties assigned to the Registrar by this Act and the Patents
Act No. 15
of 2010 and Companies Registration Agency Act, 2010.
Repeal of The principal Act is amended by the repeal of section three
section 368 hundred and sixty eight and the substitution therefor of the following:
Seal 68. (1) The seal of the Agency kept in terms of the Patents
Act No. 15 and Companies Registration Agency Act, 2010, shall be used
of 2010 for the purposes of this Act and the impression thereof made
for such purposes shall be judicially noticed.
(2) On the commencement of this Act, any impression of a seal
made for the purposes of this Act before the commencement of this
Act shall be deemed to be an impression of the seal of the Agency.
Repeal of The principal Act is amended by the repeal of section three
